holdings.infoBox: TECB is an equity ETF with a total of 186 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advanced Micro Devices stock at 8.71%, Intel at 5.44%, NVIDIA at 4.04%, Palo Alto Networks at 4.02%, and Merck & Co. at 4.00%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Tech Breakthrough Multisector ETF (TECB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYSE FactSet U.S. Tech Breakthrough index. The fund tracks an index of US equities that could benefit from breakthrough technologies, modified market cap weighted. TECB was launched on Jan 8, 2020 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: NYSE FactSet U.S. Tech Breakthrough Index
